title: helichrysum plicatum
intro: Helichrysum plicatum, a flowering plant species native to Australia and New Zealand, is a member of the daisy family and is known for its beautiful yellow flowers. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Helichrysum plicatum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules for easy consumption, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy and topical applications.
